technologies.name: ASP.NET Core SignalR JavaScript client
technologies.keyFinding: Use relative /racehub for same-origin clients and opt in to automatic reconnect.

technologies.name: ASP.NET Core SignalR security guidance
technologies.keyFinding: Cross-origin browser SignalR requires explicit CORS support, so the frontend uses a same-origin proxy.

technologies.name: Next.js rewrites
technologies.keyFinding: External rewrites act as a proxy, but a custom static server was chosen because this repo had no existing framework runtime.

technologies.name: Node.js HTTP module
technologies.keyFinding: Built-in http/https primitives are sufficient for static hosting plus backend proxying.

technologies.name: Three.js
technologies.keyFinding: Use ES modules for browser delivery, size the renderer from the canvas client box, and prefer THREE.Timer over deprecated THREE.Clock.

checks: GET /health returned 200 with {"status":"ok"} through the local proxy.
JoinLobby succeeded against the public backend and rendered the lobby.
ReadyUp triggered countdown and RaceStarted against the public backend.
The Three.js race scene rendered successfully in the live race view with zero browser console warnings or errors after the latest visual-polish pass.
Holding ArrowUp during the live race increased the HUD speed to 368 u/s, confirming input still reached the backend after the grounded-foundation camera/material update.
The latest visual pass replaced segmented track supports with a continuous grassy foundation, broader earthen banks, larger surrounding terrain, a procedural sky dome, and denser trackside scenery.
Track tile rotation mapping now swaps straight-tile axes and inverts curve-tile rotation so `TrackLoaded.tiles[].rotation` renders Dusty Fields with the correct road orientation.
notes: The results view and race HUD are implemented, but the automated smoke test stopped at race start rather than a full finish flow.
Bugfix traceability falls back to specs/pr.md REQ-006 because this repository has no specs/frd-*.md files yet.
Curve tiles were adjusted 90 degrees to the right relative to the prior mapping; straight tiles were left unchanged.

bugfix-track-tile-rotation.description: Correct Three.js track tile orientation for straight and curve tiles.
